text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
CODEBOOK: Acute Hospital Care at Home Patient and Hospital Data Files │ January 2024 │ V 1.0 6 

ESCALATIONS 

LABEL: Count of AHCAH Patients Transferred Back to Inpatient Facility During the Data Submission Period 

DESCRIPTION: The number of patients served by the hospital at home program who were transferred back to the 
traditional inpatient setting from the home during the data submission period. 

SHORT NAME: ESCALATIONS 

LONG
